time_window_policy: same retained window for both endpoint surfaces and all derived metrics
pressure_basis_policy: static, p_rgh, hydrostatic, kinetic, density, and local dynamic-pressure terms explicit
component_isolation_policy: same-basis straight reference must yield unclipped nonnegative K_local or row remains apparent_cluster_only
admission_policy: raw rows alone are never admission; later gate-review package must pass all gates
guardrail: no endpoint-pressure invention; no K clipping; no hidden global multiplier

endpoint_labels: exact mesh-station labels must be declared before sampling
time_window_policy: same retained window and sign convention as declared before launch
component_isolation_policy: component/junction loss separated from straight/development loss
admission_policy: requires later raw sampler and gate review
guardrail: do not substitute old proxy feature losses
